description: Material unavailable: an active production response requires an article whose free WMS stock is 0.
$comment: Cross-source facet (CAPT-B Phase 2, building block 3): an active production response (OperationsResponse, status=offen) requires an article whose free WMS stock is 0. The right side is N:1 (many quants per article) → 'aggregate' condenses the free stock (quantity, filtered to blocked==0) via sum. HOLDS (ok) when sum(free) > threshold(0); VIOLATED (raised) at 0. Modeled as a true multi_source class. SAFETY: 0 matches → 'unknown' (no raise before the WMS source has been observed at all). NOTE: needs a next/ quant projection with attributes article_ref/quantity/blocked (article_ref-keyed) — see report open question 'WMS projection'.
